entries.title: Group chats, channels & a settings overhaul
notes: Create group chats from the app (⌘G) on Telegram & WhatsApp, with saved macros and reusable templates
Telegram channels — including read-only ones — with a channel badge, plus forum topics as tabs inside the chat
Group messages show per-member avatars and name tags; forward any message across platforms
Cal.com plugin: when a chat mentions a date it offers to book a meeting and auto-fills known emails
Full Settings: editable theme with light/dark accent colors, tags, folders, board stages, macros & templates
Update notice + one-click self-update, and start the sync worker straight from the app on localhost
Fix: group creation no longer hangs — sends now route to a live account, never a duplicate session

entries.title: Multi-account + browser-free sync
notes: Run multiple accounts per platform (Telegram, WhatsApp, X)
Browser-free drivers: WhatsApp via Baileys, X via the cookie API
"via @account" indicator shows which account a chat is on
Connections + onboarding redesigned for multiple accounts

entries.title: Automations & pipeline
notes: Outreach automations with triggers, templates, and scheduling

entries.title: Multi-platform inbox
notes: Unified inbox across Telegram, WhatsApp, and X DMs
Contact profiles, tags, folders, and pinning
